title: juncus mutabilis var. ranarius
intro: Juncus mutabilis var. ranarius is a lesser-known variety of the Juncus mutabilis plant, also known as a type of rush, which is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its high concentration of saponins and essential oils. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Juncus mutabilis var. ranarius can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and other ailments.
